question: Trump out as President before GTA VI?
narrative_context: Congressional control (April 2026): Republicans hold House 220-215 majority, Senate GOP majority
Removal requires 2/3 Senate supermajority (67 votes) — impossible with GOP control
June 2025 impeachment attempt: Democrats impeached on Iran strikes, but lacked votes (minority party)
Midterm elections November 2026 suggest Trump expected to remain in office
evidence: Congress.gov (April 2026): Republicans hold House 220-215; Senate GOP majority
Removal requires 67 Senate votes; GOP control makes this mathematically impossible
June 2025 impeachment: Democrats failed due to minority status
No pending removal threats or constitutional crises as of April 2026
counter_evidence: Health crisis or criminal conviction could theoretically trigger involuntary exit, but current polling and institutional factors make this extremely unlikely by June 2026.
thesis: This is a 44.5pp mispricing. Trump removal requires 67 Senate votes. Republicans control the Senate. June 2025 impeachment failed due to Democratic minority. No credible removal scenario by July 2026 unless Trump voluntarily resigns (near-zero). Market prices 52.5% when institutional math says 5–10%.
x_thread: Trump removed as President by June 2026? Market: 52.5% YES. Congressional math: 8% at most. That's a 44.5pp gap.

Removal requires 67 Senate votes. Republicans control Senate. June 2025 impeachment failed because Democrats were minority. Trump expected in office through November midterms. No credible removal scenario by July.
